prompt:
Create a 9:16 photorealistic "Low Gaze Portrait" of an adult East Asian woman, 22–28, styled as a sophisticated young urban commuter with a luxury preppy aesthetic. She wears a crisp white fitted blazer, matching white pleated mini skirt, white loafers, white crew socks, and a structured white leather handbag with silver hardware.

Shoot from an extreme low-angle side-rear POV, with the camera positioned near the ground beside her shoes and handbag. She stands with both legs naturally straight, bends deeply from the hips while checking inside her handbag, then gently turns her eyes back toward the camera with a soft confident smile.

Keep the entire figure fully visible: head, face, hair, body, handbag, legs, socks and shoes. Bright blue sky background, soft natural daylight, realistic skin pores, natural fabric folds, premium editorial street-fashion photography, DSLR realism, shallow depth of field, cinematic composition.

Avoid crouching, front-facing angle, cropped body, hidden eyes, school uniform appearance, underage look, distorted anatomy, broken hands, warped shoes, plastic skin, CGI, anime, cartoon.
